description: You are advancing a world tour. Format the technical rider at ~/Documents/raw_tech_rider.docx to be a single, legible page for the venue's Technical Director. Apply 'Heading 1' style to the five main section titles. In section '4. INPUT LIST', convert the comma-separated lines into a 4-column table with a bold header row containing 'CH', 'SOURCE', 'MIC/DI', and 'NOTES'. Format every instance of the word 'CRITICAL:' as Bold and Red. In section '5. HOSPITALITY', convert the asterisked requirements into a bulleted list. Adjust the document margins to 'Narrow' (0.5 inches) and save the result to ~/Documents/results/formatted_tech_rider.docx.
